title: Huawei QSFP-40G-iSR4-eKit, QSFP+ optical module, Multi-Mode, 150m, 40G, MPO
description: Huawei QSFP-40G-iSR4-eKit is a multi-mode QSFP+ module with a maximum throughput of 40Gbps , 4 channels of 10Gbps, 850nm wavelength and a MPO-8/12 Type B connector for connection up to a distance of 150m (OM4). The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, voltage, temperature or other key parameters
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP+ For cable type Multi Mode Transmission speed 40 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 850 Distance [km] 0,15 Transfer type 12-fiber, 8-fiber Tx power [dBm] 7.6 up to 0.5 Receiver sensitivity [dBm] 9.5 Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors MPO Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal
